verdict.summary: cuBLAS handle creation failed. Usually caused by GPU memory exhaustion or CUDA context corruption.

dead_ends.why_fails: cuBLAS ships with CUDA toolkit and PyTorch; reinstalling libraries does not fix runtime context issues
This is a runtime state error, not a version compatibility issue

workarounds.action: Reduce batch size or model size to free GPU memory
workarounds.how: cuBLAS init fails when GPU memory is nearly full; reduce batch_size or use gradient checkpointing

workarounds.action: Ensure no other process is consuming GPU memory
workarounds.how: nvidia-smi  # check for zombie processes holding GPU memory

workarounds.action: Destroy and recreate CUDA context if running in a long-lived process

preceded_by.condition: OOM weakens CUDA context, subsequent cuBLAS calls fail

frequently_confused_with.distinction: Device-side assert is a kernel logic error; CUBLAS_NOT_INITIALIZED is a context/memory initialization failure
